content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 7

   - I was under the impression that CB fees were always higher than local.
   Do we know why CB Mall > Local?

Maybe we should see if we should adjust for
   other markets too.
   - The numbers for MY here look a bit odd. It cannot be so high
   - @Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com> thoughts?

Slide 8

   - Am aligned with this directionally when it comes to 3PF WH, feels like
   the right thing to do
   - But will it be possible to maintain same rates as last year for Shopee
   WH?

Slide 17 – 23

   - @Cheng Derek <derek.cheng@shopee.com> @Shuning Wang
   <shuning.wang@shopee.com> @Keljin Chua <keljin.chua@shopee.com> @Ning Li
   <ning.li@shopee.com>, can see if the counterparty here for the various
   projects make sense to you?
- Who are the counterparties for KR/JP side?

- If we breakdown into the 3 distinct business needs, is there 1 PIC
   that we can clearly identify for each?
So it is clearer on our side?

- FP&A reporting matters
      - SLS related matters (SLS/3PF/FBS/KR/JP)
      - Lovito



Slide 34

   - @Ning Li <ning.li@shopee.com> Shall we share our sourcing methodology
   here?

Others

   - For CB >> How are we performing vs OKRs and budget for the month?

Dear All,

Thank you for joining THCB Monthly Catch up - Jan'25. Please see below a
next step and key action summary.
No. Topic Action Items PIC ETA
1 THCB Commission Increase Align to increase 1% for all CB sellers except
LFF 3PF.
LFF 3PF commission increase will be 4%.
- Effective Date: 1 March
- Seller communication: 7 Feb

Mall and Non-Mall Rate CB SLS rate:
- check from product side whether currently we can set different rates for
CB SLS-MALL and CB SLS-Non mall since local rate charge higher com base for
mall than non-mall. - Local CB Project: tiffany.jin@shopee.com
- Local Seller Program: poon.pooshutv@shopee.com
- SLS product team: jiaqi.yao@shopee.com, shuning.wang@shopee.com Eff. 1 Mar
2 CB Key Priorities Aligned on the key PIC for TH Market on the respective
aspects - FP&A: book.krasaesi@shopee.com
- Lovito: man.prasertsri@shopee.com
- SLS: yu.cheng@shopee.com 15 Jan
3 Lovito Resource Updates To monitor the Lovito closely by Local (P’Man
team) on the investment, target, and assortment. Also, the local will
subsidize the rebate only to start and build new things - Lovito team: Larry
- Fash CL: man.prasertsri@shopee.com 15 Jan
4 Taobao Program Update Pending regional SIP to share new seller lists -
Local CB Project: tiffany.jin@shopee.com
- Regional SIP: Nicholas.lim@shopee.com W4 Jan
5 Regional SSP Regional CB (Derek's Team) to share overall regional SSP
theme settings from all markets and align with TH BI on the methodology.
The Objective KPI for Regional SSP:
1. GMV Growth vs Platform
2. Seller PC2
3. Price Competitiveness - Local BI Lead: tung.anunrojw@shopee.com
- CNCB Project Head: derek.cheng@shopee.com W4 Jan

Please feel free to add if there is any point not listed.

Thank you

*Tiffany Jinawong (Tiff)*

THCB Team
